title: Fix tooltip remnant artifacts in notation panel toggle buttons

source.notes: User report: when hovering over the toggle buttons (hide moves, table view, hide comments, hide variations) in the notation panel, moving between buttons leaves remnant letters from the previous tooltip visible.

description: Four Mantine Tooltip components in GameNotation.tsx (lines 165-186) have dynamic labels that change when the toggle state flips (e.g. 'Hide Comments' ↔ 'Show Comments'). When moving the mouse between adjacent buttons, the tooltip text from the previous button bleeds through — remnant characters are visible during the transition. This is a known Mantine Tooltip issue with closely-spaced dynamic tooltips.
notes: 4 tooltips in a tight Group with gap='sm'
Each tooltip label is a ternary that changes on state toggle
Likely cause: Mantine Tooltip reuses the floating element and animates, but the text update races with the open/close transition

Possible fixes: (1) add openDelay to prevent instant show on mouse-through, (2) add key prop to force re-mount on label change, (3) use withinPortal to isolate rendering, (4) use Tooltip.Group with openDelay for coordinated behavior
Mantine docs recommend Tooltip.Group for adjacent tooltips: https://mantine.dev/core/tooltip/#tooltip-group

in_scope: Fix the tooltip remnant artifacts for the 4 notation panel toggles
Use Mantine's recommended pattern (Tooltip.Group or openDelay)

requirements: Moving between toggle buttons shows clean tooltip text with no remnants
Each tooltip still shows the correct label for its current state
Toggling a button updates its tooltip text immediately
Tooltips still appear on hover (not removed entirely)
edge_cases: Rapidly moving mouse across all 4 buttons
Hovering a button, clicking it (toggles state), then moving to next button
Mouse leaving the button group entirely — tooltip should disappear cleanly

acceptance_gates: No remnant text visible when moving between toggle buttons
All 4 tooltips still display correct text

manual: Open a game in the analysis board
Slowly move mouse across all 4 toggle buttons (eye, table, comments, variations)
Verify each tooltip shows clean text with no remnant letters from the previous
Click a toggle (e.g. hide comments), hover it again — tooltip should say 'Show Comments'
Rapidly sweep mouse back and forth across the buttons — no artifacts
